description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a .job_template with a before_script that sets TERM and SHELL, updates git submodules, starts ssh-agent, adds the SSH_PRIVATE_KEY, configures SSH to skip host checking, copies the repository into a temporary this_package directory, replaces src with this_package, runs catkin build, installs catkin_tools_fetch, and fetches catkin dependencies from git@gitlab.com:srrg-software. Add a build_kinetic job in the build stage that uses the image registry.gitlab.com/srrg-software/srrg_nw_calibration, inherits the before_script, runs catkin build --no-status --verbose, catkin run_tests --no-status --verbose, and catkin test --no-status --verbose, and is tagged with docker and linux runners. The job does not define any caches, artifacts, or conditional rules and runs on any branch.
